---
title: Home
format: 
  html:
    include-in-header:
        text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/bitmaks/cm-web-fonts@latest/fonts.css">
          <style>
            body, p, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, li, td, th {
              font-family: "Computer Modern Serif", serif !important;
            }
          </style>
---

## About

Project Engineer at a GC/CM in NYC; residential construction in CT before that. I love to build things — with lumber, data, or other mediums.

## Research Projects
- [QXGBoost for NYC Construction Risk](documents/qxgboost.pdf)
- [Innovation Outcomes](thesis.html)
- [UOG & Induced Seismicity](frackin.html)


## Resume

[Download Resume](documents/resume.pdf)
